gist.headline: The menu got a glow-up
gist.blurb: The pricing page got a much-needed visual refresh. We added brand logos, status badges, and copyable API keys so you can spend less time squinting at tables and more time building.
gist.summary: The pricing UI has been redesigned to include brand logos, status badges, and one-click copyable API keys for easier model discovery.
gist.impact: Users can now easily browse models by brand, quickly copy API keys, and enjoy a much cleaner layout on both desktop and mobile.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee looking at a beautifully organized shop menu board or display case featuring various colorful brand logos, representing the new pricing UI and model registry.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny shop apron, admiring a beautiful wooden menu board filled with colorful glowing brand logos. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a clean, organized list. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
